mitools.notes: Upstream shared library (@micthiesen/mitools) this project consumes; its upkeep skill was adapted from this repo's.

resources.notes: Shared shape only (sync remote -> survey -> research majors -> apply -> verify -> ship). Steps are environment-specific: this repo has a frontend workspace, Dockerfile, and LLM model IDs; mitools is a published library whose CI publishes to npm on a version bump. Port procedure improvements, never the project-specific steps.
